steps.title: Identify the defining feature
steps.content: The claim emphasizes juxtaposition—not just that realism and folklore both appear, but how they interact. The quotation must reveal the mechanism of this combination, the active interplay that defines magical realism.

steps.title: Find the quotation showing the mechanism
steps.content:
Choice B shows this directly: the realistic plot is “repeatedly and productively disrupted” by folklore-derived imagery and situations.

This captures magical realism's core—antirealistic elements deployed within a realistic mode. The other choices acknowledge both elements without explaining how they actively interact.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
